title: DEEPCRAFT™ Model Converter
description: Converts, optimizes and validates AI models for Infineon MCUs
long_description: The DEEPCRAFT™ Model Converter is a software application that supports the Bring Your Own Model concept (BYOM), which allows users to bring their own AI model and run it on edge devices. This application helps machine learning engineers work more efficiently, by streamlining the processes for running their models on their target hardware. Models are converted so they can run on the edge. Models are optimized, which means they will become highly compact and high-performance models, designed to run on Infineon MCUs. Models are validated with a dataset to check that the generated code matches the performance in the original models. Validation is done on the desktop, it has an easy-to-use Graphical User Interface (GUI) and runs on Windows, Linux and Mac. It also includes a Command Line Interface (CLI) to enable integration into Continuous Integration (CI)/Continuous Delivery (CD) pipelines and workflows.
